:mod:`DMF implementation of Archive`
====================================

.. module:: archive.dmf

.. versionadded:: 0.1
.. moduleauthor:: Claude Gibert <claude.gibert@synopticview.co.uk>

.. class:: DMF(Archive)

The **DMF** implement the abstract methods of the class :class:`archive.archive.Archive`
to handle a DMF file system. Whenever **dm...** commands are called for multiple files,
a pipe is open between the current process and the dmget command to pass the list of 
files. This is more efficient. It is much safer not to pass any files which are not handled
by DMF as some invalid results can sometimes be encountered (e.g. NASA).

    .. method:: do_stage(filelist):

        :param filelist: list of files to stage
        :type filelist: sequence

        Calls the command **dmget** for each of the file specified. 

    .. method:: offline(filelist):

        :param filelist: a list of files in the archive
        :type filelist: sequence

        Calls the command **dmattr -a state** for each of the files and if the 
        result is OFL, the file is kept in the list of files to stage. Returns
        the list of files found offline.

    .. method:: filesize(filelist):

        :param filelist: a list of files in the archive
        :type filelist: sequence

        Calls the command **dmattr -a size** for each of the files and returns a list
        of sizes in bytes.

    .. method:: do_copy(filelist,destination):

        :param filelist: a list of files in the archive
        :type filelist: sequence
        :param destination: path to the destination directory
        :type destination: string

        Does nothing, files once put online are accessible from the DMF virtual file system.
